title: erigeron muirii
intro: Erigeron muirii, also known as Mount Muir Fleabane, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Erigeron muirii is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and even acting as an antioxidant. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and it can also be dried and used in capsules or as a powder for medicinal purposes.
